level1.name: lapp.n.01
level1.definition: a member of an indigenous nomadic people living in northern Scandinavia and herding reindeer

level1.name: be.v.01

level1.name: protein.n.01
level1.definition: any of a large group of nitrogenous organic compounds that are essential constituents of living cells; consist of polymers of amino acids; essential in the diet of animals for growth and for repair of tissues; can be obtained from meat and eggs and milk and legumes

level1.name: may.n.01
level1.definition: the month following April and preceding June

level2.name: european.n.01
level2.definition: a native or inhabitant of Europe

level2.name: macromolecule.n.01
level2.definition: any very large complex molecule; found only in plants and animals

level2.name: gregorian_calendar_month.n.01
level2.definition: a month in the Gregorian calendar

level2.name: unit.n.03

level3.definition: a person who inhabits a particular place

level3.name: organic_compound.n.01
level3.definition: any compound of carbon and another element or a radical

level3.name: calendar_month.n.01
level3.definition: one of the twelve divisions of the calendar year

level3.name: organization.n.01

level4.name: compound.n.02
level4.definition: (chemistry) a substance formed by chemical union of two or more elements or ingredients in definite proportion by weight
